problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Self-assembled. Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
